title: GLM-5.2 + OpenDesign: SOTA CHEAP DESIGN SYSTEM! This is AWESOME!
summary: AICodeKing demonstrates GLM-5.2 combined with OpenDesign to generate high-quality UI prototypes including landing pages, dashboards, and mobile app interfaces. The workflow produces polished HTML and CSS artifacts with consistent design systems through integration via OpenCode and Z.AI's API setup, with OpenDesign installable via desktop app, source, or Docker.
writeup: AICodeKing pairs GLM-5.2 with OpenDesign to generate UI prototypes including landing pages, dashboards, and mobile app interfaces. The workflow outputs polished HTML and CSS artifacts that hold to a consistent design system, wired together through OpenCode and a Z.AI API setup. OpenDesign can be installed via desktop app, source, or Docker.
